message:
fix(wizard): map windows-terminal-setup bonus route to canonical step

The wizard sidebar now correctly highlights the "Verify Key Connection" step
when users are on the /wizard/windows-terminal-setup bonus page.

Problem:
- Windows users following the SSH key setup flow end up on a route that
  doesn't correspond to any wizard step ID
- The sidebar showed no step as active, creating a confusing UX

Solution:
- getStepBySlug() now canonicalizes "windows-terminal-setup" to
  "verify-key-connection" before lookup
- This ensures the sidebar highlights step 11 during Windows-specific
  terminal setup, maintaining user orientation in the wizard flow

The pattern is extensible for future bonus routes that should map to
existing canonical steps.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
